client_dependency_boundary: The HTTP client uses Python standard-library HTTP and JSON only. XBrainLab EEG, PyQt, PyTorch, and local LLM dependencies remain in the server process.
session_boundary: This is a headless ApplicationService MCP session. It does not control or refresh the desktop UI.
long_running_boundary: HTTP train job status and cancel are available for the headless session. Evaluation/visualization jobs, persistence, and recovery are not enabled in this slice.

result.instructions: Use tools to operate XBrainLab through ApplicationService only. Data interpretation apply, training, reset, and destructive commands may require human confirmation in the returned autonomy policy.

tools.name: scan_source
tools.title: Scan Source
tools.description: Scan a source path for EEG files, label carriers, and metadata.

tools.name: preview_interpretation
tools.title: Preview Interpretation
tools.description: Build and preview a candidate data interpretation.

recipe_id.description: Saved recipe identifier carried through recipe reload.

selected_eeg_files.description: Selected EEG files from the latest scan result.

required_label_carriers.description: Saved label/event carriers that must be present or explicitly remapped before apply.

eeg_file_remap.description: Map saved EEG file path/name from a recipe to the current replacement EEG file path/name before re-previewing.

label_carrier_remap.description: Map saved label/event carrier path/name from a recipe to the current replacement carrier before re-previewing.

label_field.description: Column, variable, or label sequence used as class labels.

anchor.description: Column, variable, or event anchor used for timing.

time_model.description: How carrier timing should be interpreted.

granularity.description: Whether labels describe trials, events, or a recording.

role.description: User-facing role for the carrier, such as class cue labels.

target_file.description: EEG file path/name this carrier should align with.

label_carrier_choices.description: Per-carrier label field, anchor, time model, granularity, role, and target-file choices keyed by carrier path or file name.

event_roles.description: Map event field names to user-confirmed roles.

metadata_overrides.description: Per-EEG-file metadata overrides keyed by file path or file name.

label_carrier.description: Where labels/events come from for this import.

class_map.description: Map raw event or label values to class names.

choices.description: Optional user-confirmed choices for Data Interpretation preview. Recipe reload remaps belong here, not in legacy load/attach tools.

reasons: Scan a data source before previewing interpretation.

tools.name: validate_interpretation
tools.title: Validate Interpretation
tools.description: Validate an interpretation candidate.

reasons: Preview an interpretation candidate before validation.

tools.name: apply_interpretation
tools.title: Apply Interpretation
tools.description: Apply a validated interpretation to the active backend session.

reasons: Validate an interpretation before applying it.
Reset the session before changing raw files, labels, or metadata after epoching or dataset generation.

tools.name: save_interpretation_recipe
tools.title: Save Interpretation Recipe
tools.description: Save the applied interpretation as a replayable recipe.

reasons: Apply an interpretation before saving a recipe.

tools.name: reload_interpretation_recipe
tools.title: Reload Interpretation Recipe
tools.description: Reload a recipe and re-run scan/preview/validation without applying.

tools.name: load_data
tools.title: Load Data
tools.description: Legacy compatibility: directly load raw EEG files. Prefer Data Interpretation scan_source -> preview_interpretation -> validate_interpretation -> apply_interpretation for new imports.

reasons: Reset the session before loading new raw data after epoching, dataset generation, or trainer creation.

tools.name: attach_labels
tools.title: Attach Labels
tools.description: Legacy compatibility: attach label files to already-loaded raw data. Prefer Data Interpretation label/event carrier preview, validation, apply, and recipe trace for new imports.

reasons: Reset the session before changing raw files, labels, or metadata after epoching or dataset generation.

tools.name: import_labels
tools.title: Import Labels
tools.description: Legacy compatibility: apply an explicit post-load label import plan. Prefer Data Interpretation label/event carrier review and recipe flow for new imports.

reasons: Reset the session before changing raw files, labels, or metadata after epoching or dataset generation.

tools.name: update_metadata
tools.title: Update Metadata
tools.description: Update subject/session metadata for one or more loaded files.

reasons: Reset the session before changing raw files, labels, or metadata after epoching or dataset generation.

tools.name: apply_smart_parse
tools.title: Apply Smart Parse
tools.description: Apply filename parser results to loaded-file metadata.

reasons: Reset the session before changing raw files, labels, or metadata after epoching or dataset generation.

tools.name: remove_files
tools.title: Remove Files
tools.description: Remove loaded raw files by row/index.

reasons: Reset the session before changing raw files, labels, or metadata after epoching or dataset generation.

tools.name: preprocess
tools.title: Preprocess
tools.description: Apply a preprocessing operation to the active study.

reasons: Reset the session before changing preprocessing after epoching or dataset generation.

tools.name: create_epoch
tools.title: Create Epoch
tools.description: Create epochs from preprocessed data.

reasons: Preprocess data before creating epochs.
Reset the session before recreating epochs for the active dataset.

tools.name: generate_dataset
tools.title: Generate Dataset
tools.description: Generate train/validation/test datasets from epoch data.

reasons: Create epochs before generating datasets.
Reset the session or start a new session before generating a new dataset from an existing active dataset.

tools.name: clear_datasets
tools.title: Clear Datasets
tools.description: Clear generated datasets and any training plan tied to them.

tools.name: configure_training
tools.title: Configure Training
tools.description: Configure model and training hyperparameters.

tools.name: train
tools.title: Train
tools.description: Start model training.

tools.name: stop_training
tools.title: Stop Training
tools.description: Stop an active training run.

reasons: No training run is active.

tools.name: clear_training_history
tools.title: Clear Training History
tools.description: Clear training plan/run history while preserving current configuration.

reasons: No training history is available to clear.

tools.name: evaluate
tools.title: Evaluate
tools.description: Read evaluation metrics and run summaries from the active backend.

reasons: Create a training plan before evaluating results.

tools.name: visualize
tools.title: Visualize
tools.description: Read visualization readiness and available view summaries.

reasons: Create epochs, complete training, or configure saliency before opening visualization views.

tools.name: saliency
tools.title: Saliency
tools.description: Configure or query saliency readiness.

tools.name: apply_montage
tools.title: Apply Montage
tools.description: Apply confirmed channel montage positions to epoch data.

reasons: Create epochs before applying a montage.

tools.name: query_state
tools.title: Query State
tools.description: Read-only typed query through the application service.

tools.name: reset_preprocess
tools.title: Reset Preprocess
tools.description: Reset preprocessing to loaded raw data and remove downstream artifacts.

tools.name: reset_session
tools.title: Reset Session
tools.description: Clear loaded data and downstream state.

tools.name: new_session
tools.title: New Session
tools.description: Start a new single-backend session by clearing current state.

content.text: Scanned source and found 1 EEG file(s).
